content:
S E R I P A D U K A B A G I N D A
HIS MAJESTY'S GOVERNMENT GAZETTE

source_name: Direction of the Minister under paragraph 466(1)(a)
section: Act 2016 [Act 777], the Minister prescribes that the amount of indebtedness
section_title: Act 2016 [Act 777], the Minister prescribes that the amount of indebtedness
content:
of a company for the purposes of the paragraph shall be an amount exceeding
fifty thousand ringgit with effect from 23 April 2020 until 31 December 2020.
